subcodes.first_line: O herald of the Covenant! It hath been some time since the pen of 'Abdu'l-Baha hath addressed thee, yet this [4o]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای منادی میثاق مدتیست که قلم عبدالبهاء مخاطبا بانجناب چیزی ننگاشته ولی این
subcodes.subjects: @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @prayer for the spiritual progress of others, @characteristics and conduct of true believers, @unity; oneness of humanity
